channel.title: Jeremydmiller.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Jeremydmiller.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Critter Stack Roadmap Update for 1st Quarter 2026
item.description: That is an American Polecat (black-footed ferret), our avatar for our newest Critter Stack project. Mostly for my own sake to collect my own thoughts, I wanted to do a little update on the Critter Stack roadmap as it looks right now. This is an update on Critter Stack Roadmap for 2026 from December. Things have … Continue reading Critter Stack Roadmap Update for 1st Quarter 2026 → Link to article: https://jeremydmiller.

item.title: 2 Weeks of Claude Code for Me
item.description: I’m busy all the time with the Critter Stack tools, answering questions on Slack or Discord, and trying like hell to make JasperFx Software go. I’ve admittedly had my head in the sand a bit about the AI tools for coding, thinking that what I do being relatively novel for the most part and that … Continue reading 2 Weeks of Claude Code for Me → Link to article: https://jeremydmiller.com/2026/02/14/2-weeks-of-claude-code-for-me/
